aesthetic: Kiln Glaze — coral glaze, all-serif warmth, organic whitespace
principles: All-serif pairing: Fraunces italic + Lora — magazine warmth
Organic asymmetry: titles offset, irregular whitespace
Coral #ff5a5f for quote marks (60px+) as visual anchor
Every page has human trace: quote/name/story/scene
Storyteller tone: narrative warmth, specific details
promptGuide: Apply the Kiln Glaze aesthetic: Fraunces italic weight 500 display, Lora weight 400 body (all-serif pairing), bg #faf7f2 (warm like pottery glaze), text #222222 (warm near-black), Coral red #ff385c for quote marks/key data/section dividers, teal #00a699 for secondary highlights, 20px+ border-radius (core identity), 3-layer shadows (ring 0.02 + near 0.04 + far 0.1), organic asymmetry (titles left-upper/right-lower), storyteller tone: 'we discovered', specific people/scenes, quote layout is star.
